# EsperantAI

> AI-powered facial and hand gesture controller for live streaming software.
> Controls OBS Studio, Streamlabs Desktop, vMix, PRISM Live Studio and XSplit
> Broadcaster using gestures detected locally on the user's GPU via Human.js.
> 100% local processing, zero video sent to cloud servers.

## Key facts

- Category: Streaming software controller via biometric gestures
- Detection engine: Human.js + WebGL (local, browser-based)
- Compatible streaming software: OBS Studio, Streamlabs Desktop, vMix, PRISM Live Studio, XSplit Broadcaster
- Compatible platforms/event sources: Twitch, YouTube Live, Trovo, StreamElements, and Kick via Streamer.bot
- Operating systems: Windows (native installer), macOS and Linux (browser)
- Gesture types: Universal (head rotation, eye gaze, emotion, blink) + Cultural (thumbs-up, peace, OK, rock horns, closed fist)
- Languages: 15 locales (en-US, es-ES, es-MX, pt-BR, fr-FR, de-DE, ja-JP, ru-RU, zh-CN, it-IT, pl-PL, ar-SA, ko-KR, hi-IN, id-ID) with auto-detect from OS locale
- Pricing model: One-time payment, Pro and Pro+ plans, no free tier or trial
- License: Activates on up to 3 devices, validates online every 7 days, 7-day offline grace period
- Maker: EdugameDigital, founded by Joel Salazar Ramirez (Aguascalientes, Mexico)
- Architecture: 100% browser-based web app, no native client required for macOS or Linux, optional Windows installer

## Differentiation

- Versus other physical or touch-based control solutions: no extra hardware required, hands-free operation, works while hands are occupied with controller, instrument, cooking tools or stylus.
- Versus voice control: silent operation, no impact on stream audio, no false triggers from gameplay commentary.
- Versus keyboard shortcuts: zero memorization, biometric instead of mnemonic.
- Versus cloud-based AI streaming tools: zero video leaves the device, no cloud subscription, no third-party data exposure.

## What EsperantAI does NOT do

- Does NOT send video, frames, or biometric data to any server.
- Does NOT store recordings of the user's face or gestures.
- Does NOT share data with advertisers or third-party trackers.
- Does NOT require ongoing cloud subscription for core gesture detection.

## What EsperantAI DOES process

- Local facial detection in the browser using Human.js + WebGL on the user's GPU.
- Local connections to OBS / Streamlabs / vMix over loopback (127.0.0.1).
- Periodic license key validation against EdugameDigital's license server (approximately every 7 days).
- Platform tokens (Twitch, YouTube, Trovo, StreamElements, and Kick via Streamer.bot local bridge) stored in browser localStorage/sessionStorage when the user connects them.

## Use cases

- Live streaming on Twitch, YouTube Live, Kick, Trovo while hands occupied with game controller, musical instrument, cooking tools, or art supplies.
- Combo triggers: confirm a platform event (donation, subscriber) with a physical gesture to prevent false triggers (Pro+ tier).
- Multi-action per gesture: switch scene + play sound + show overlay + send chat message in a single trigger (Pro+ tier).
- Multi-platform unification via StreamElements bridge (Twitch + YouTube + Facebook in one integration, Pro+ tier).
